Resume

AI Infrastructure & LLM Platform Engineer

Professional Summary

AI/ML & Python Engineer with 4+ years of experience

AI/ML & Python Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable LLM platforms and distributed ML systems. Proven ability to modernize legacy architectures, integrate AI into production, and drive significant 27% cloud cost reduction and 30% API latency reduction. Expertise in GPU infrastructure, Kubernetes orchestration, and end-to-end ML/LLM pipeline development.

singhsurjit7@outlook.com linkedin.com/in/surjit7 github.com/surjit7

Experience

AI/ML & Python Engineer

2023 – Present

BJS Home Delivery

Remote

  • Built self-hosted LLM platform (vLLM, Ollama, PyTorch, Chroma) with SSO & RBAC
  • Deployed GPU workloads on Kubernetes enabling scalable ML & LLM inference
  • Automated distributed training & deployment using Ray
  • Integrated AI workflows into legacy & new applications
  • 27% Cloud Cost Savings
  • 30% API Latency Reduction
  • 5 Systems Modernized
vLLM Ollama PyTorch Kubernetes Azure Pipelines Ray Chroma SSO RBAC

2021 – 2022

Connoisseur Infotech

Remote

  • Developed and optimized deep learning NLP models (BERT/Huggingface)
  • Improved BERT F1 score from 71 to 91 through model optimization
  • Reduced inference time by 20% through quantization and batch processing
  • Built Python REST APIs using Flask and FastAPI
  • Prepared and processed multilingual datasets

2021

Extech Digital

India
